backend/main.mo: Entry point for the Motoko backend actor that includes blob storage functionality via a mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the KopdeGoa rebuild feature to its relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties defining light and dark theme tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the KopdeGoa React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full KopdeGoa page layout with Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying KopdeGoa's brand story paragraphs and a four-value card grid (Quality, Authenticity, Trust, Community) with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with phone, location, and hours info cards, social media links, and a validated form that opens a mailto link on submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing the KopdeGoa logo, contact details, a smooth-scroll Request Changes link, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a centered logo, split desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu with smooth-scroll section navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for KopdeGoa with a background image, gradient overlay, brand name, tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to 'products' and 'contact' sections.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Products section displaying a grid of 7 liquor/wine category cards (Whisky, Wine, Vodka, Rum, Beer, Flavored Drinks, Heritage Spirits) with icons, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/QrCodeSection.ts: Empty module that exports nothing; placeholder for a QR code section component.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Completely empty file; placeholder for a Services component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty module; placeholder indicating no backend data-fetching queries are needed for this static site.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes (primary deep blue, accent red) plus utility classes for accent-red color variants.
frontend/src/lib/qr.ts: Empty file; placeholder for QR code utility functions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radii, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the KopdeGoa app at version 3, recording one existing feature (rebuild/redeploy preserving all frontend and backend components) with no new feature requests.
